nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned children and submit behavior

compositionPolicy.publicComponents: Composes canonical Button, Field, Input, PasswordField, and OtpField source items.
compositionPolicy.adapter: The consumer owns identity, credential, passkey, session, authorization, recovery, audit, and network behavior.
compositionPolicy.enhancements: Flow navigation, rate-limit recovery output, and security context remain independent opt-ins.
